habitat: Edges of woods and hedgerows of Europe.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional diaphoretic tea for colds; cordials; berries used as food when cooked.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionell schweißtreibender Tee bei Erkältung; Sirupe; Beeren nur gekocht als Nahrung.
activeCompounds: Flavonoids, phenolic acids, triterpenes; berries: anthocyanins
preparation: Flower infusion; cooked berry products. Uncooked green parts and raw berries can be unpleasant/toxic.
cautions: Do not eat raw leaves, stems, or unripe berries. Cook berries thoroughly.
historicalNotes: Deeply rooted in European folklore and seasonal foodways.
habitatDe: Edges von Wälder und hedgerows von Europa.
activeCompoundsDe: Flavonoids, phenolic acids, triterpenes; berries: anthocyanins
preparationDe: Flower Aufguss; gekocht Beere products. Uncooked green parts und raw berries kann be unpleasant/toxic.
cautionsDe: Do not eat raw Blätter, Stängel, oder unripe berries. Cook berries thoroughly.
historicalNotesDe: Deeply rooted in Europaan folklore und seasonal foodways.
